title: Rebuild app as animated parchment scroll letter

requirements.summary: Create dark entry screen with parchment-styled 'Open My Heart ❤️' button that reveals the scroll when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Entry screen shows only the 'Open My Heart ❤️' button centered on a #121212 background
Button uses Cinzel font, parchment (#f4e4bc) background, gold (#b89b5e) border, border-radius 50px
Hover state scales to 1.1 and rotates 2deg with white glow shadow
Clicking the button hides the entry screen and shows the scroll

file_operations.description: Replace the envelope-based UI with a new entry screen component. The entry screen displays a centered 'Open My Heart ❤️' button on a #121212 background. Manage showScroll state (initially false). When the button is clicked, set showScroll to true to hide the entry screen and reveal the scroll component. Remove the existing Envelope component and footer.

Implement the entry button component. Render a button with text 'Open My Heart ❤️' using Cinzel font (font-family: 'Cinzel', serif). Apply parchment background color (#f4e4bc), gold border (4px solid #b89b5e), border-radius 50px, padding 20px 50px, font-size 1.5rem, font-weight 700, and cursor pointer. Implement hover effect: scale(1.1), rotate(2deg), and white glow box-shadow (0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,0.8)). Add smooth transition for all transforms. Accept onClick prop to trigger parent state change.

requirements.summary: Implement animated parchment scroll with wooden roll handles and candle decorations that animates from height 0 to 75vh
acceptanceCriteria: Two wooden roll handles appear above and below the parchment, each 45px tall with candle emoji decorations
Parchment animates open from height 0 to 75vh over 1.8s
Parchment background is #f4e4bc with paper-fibers texture from transparenttextures.com
Parchment has 4px solid #b89b5e borders on left and right
Scroll is max-width 650px, centered, 95% wide

file_operations.description: Replace the envelope UI with a scroll component. Render a scroll-container (max-width 650px, width 95%, margin 0 auto). Inside, render: (1) Top wooden roll handle (45px height, background linear-gradient(to bottom, #3d1f00, #8b4513, #3d1f00), border-radius 25px, width 100%, with 🕯️ emoji decorations positioned at left and right ends using flexbox); (2) Parchment body (background #f4e4bc with paper-fibers texture overlay from https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/paper-fibers.png, borders left and right 4px solid #b89b5e, box-shadow inset 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), overflow-y auto, padding 40px 30px); (3) Bottom wooden roll handle (same as top). When isOpen prop is true, add 'open' class to parchment-body which animates height from 0 to 75vh over 1.8s using cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55). Accept isOpen prop and render children inside the parchment body.

Add CSS animations and styles for the scroll component. Define @keyframes for scroll opening animation. Add styles for .scroll-container, .scroll-roll (wooden handles), .parchment-body (default height 0, overflow hidden), and .parchment-body.open (height 75vh, transition 1.8s cubic-bezier). Include paper-fibers texture background-image, gold borders, inner shadow, and responsive adjustments for mobile (max-width 480px). Ensure all existing Tailwind directives and theme variables remain intact.

requirements.summary: Render letter content inside parchment with fade-in animation, including title, six paragraphs, exam note, and close button
acceptanceCriteria: Letter content fades in with 1.2s opacity transition delayed 1.2s after open class is added
h1 uses Great Vibes font at 2.8rem in color #d42424
Body text uses Dancing Script at 1.4rem with line-height 1.7, color #2c1e16
All six paragraphs and exam note section are present with correct emoji and text
Gold horizontal rule separates love letter section from exam note section
Highlight paragraph is bold, #b52b2b, 1.5rem
'Roll Back & Close 📜' button collapses parchment over 1.8s then shows entry screen
On mobile (max-width 480px) content font-size is 1.2rem and h1 is 2.2rem

file_operations.description: Replace the existing letter content with the exact content from the provided HTML. Render: (1) h1 'To My Most Special Person 🌹' using Great Vibes font, 2.8rem, color #d42424, text-align center, margin-bottom 30px; (2) Six body paragraphs in Dancing Script font, 1.4rem, line-height 1.7, color #2c1e16, text-align justify, margin-bottom 20px each (exact text from provided HTML with all emojis); (3) Gold horizontal rule (border: none, height 2px, background #b89b5e, margin 30px 0); (4) Exam note paragraph with class 'highlight' in bold, color #b52b2b, 1.5rem, text-align center ('✍️ A Note for Your Maths Exam ✍️' followed by exam encouragement text); (5) 'Roll Back & Close 📜' button styled like the entry button (Cinzel font, parchment bg, gold border, pill shape) that calls onClose prop. Wrap all content in a div with class 'letter-content' that fades in (opacity 0 to 1) with 1.2s transition and 1.2s delay when parent has 'open' class. Add media query for mobile: content 1.2rem, h1 2.2rem.

requirements.summary: Load Google Fonts (Dancing Script, Cinzel, Great Vibes) and apply them consistently across all UI elements
acceptanceCriteria: Dancing Script 600 is loaded and applied to body and letter content
Cinzel 400/700 is loaded and applied to buttons
Great Vibes is loaded and applied to the h1 heading

file_operations.description: Replace the existing Google Fonts link with the exact fonts required: Dancing Script (weight 600), Cinzel (weights 400 and 700), and Great Vibes. Use the following URL in the <head> section: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Dancing+Script:wght@600&family=Cinzel:wght@400;700&family=Great+Vibes&display=swap. Ensure the link is placed before other stylesheets.

Update the fontFamily theme extension to include the three new Google Fonts. Add 'dancing': ['Dancing Script', 'cursive'], 'cinzel': ['Cinzel', 'serif'], and 'vibes': ['Great Vibes', 'cursive'] to the fontFamily object. Keep all existing font family definitions intact.

Set the default body font-family to 'Dancing Script', cursive, weight 600. Ensure all button elements use 'Cinzel', serif. Add utility classes or CSS rules to apply Great Vibes to h1 elements within letter content. Verify font loading and fallback fonts are specified.

requirements.summary: Set page title to 'A Message for the Most Special Person ✨' and prevent horizontal overflow
acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab title reads 'A Message for the Most Special Person ✨'
No horizontal scrollbar appears at any viewport width
Layout centers correctly on both desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Change the <title> tag content from 'For My Cutee 🌹' to 'A Message for the Most Special Person ✨'. Ensure the title is the only change to the HTML structure.

Add overflow-x: hidden to the body and html elements to prevent any horizontal scrolling. Ensure all container elements (scroll-container, parchment-body) use max-width and responsive width percentages. Verify centering with margin: 0 auto on containers. Add box-sizing: border-box globally if not already present.
